name: Space Guardian
short_description: Robots have launched an attack on humans, and the space guardian force is dispatched to fight to defend the earth! This is a fast-paced arcade-style casual car battle game. The levels are all randomly generated by the program and can be challenged forever.
detailed_description:
This is a fast-paced arcade-style casual car battle game. The levels are all randomly generated by the program and can be challenged forever.

Gameplay

  • 6 types of vehicles and 6 types of weapons are available for collection.
  • After destroying the enemies in each level, go to the next level.
  • Upgrade the attributes of the battle car as you like.
  • All over again after failure.
  • Can be played with one hand.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Polish, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil
